query:
INSERT INTO stack_template (
            id,
            creator_user_id,
            creator_name,
            name,
            slug,
            short_description,
            status,
            tags,
            tech_stack,
            view_count,
            deploy_count,
            created_at,
            updated_at
        )
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, 'approved', '[]'::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW())
